pi_items.verified_value: Link existing parent Robert Parr to student Dash Parr without creating duplicate parent record
pi_items.source: task.json lines 1-5; verifier.py lines 10-18; export_result.sh lines 18-42

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic student database with three members of the Parr family: Dash Parr (student, grade 4), Violet Parr (student, grade 10), and Robert Parr (parent/father). The OpenSIS database is created with credentials opensis_user / opensis_password_123, and admin access uses credentials admin / Admin@123. The task requires linking the existing parent Robert Parr (already linked to Violet) to the new student Dash Parr without creating duplicate records. The verifier checks three success criteria: (1) Dash is linked to Robert in the student_parent table, (2) no duplicate Robert Parr records exist, and (3) Robert is linked to at least 2 children (Violet and Dash).
